score_range_label.zh: 中等确信度 (50-69) — 最低端

position_advice.en: 50% (Standard Position, Lower End — recovering from 45% yesterday)
position_advice.zh: 50%（标准仓位下沿，从昨天 45% 回升）

condition.zh: 紧缩，最坏时刻大概率已过

summary.en: USD liquidity remains in tightening mode, but the worst is likely behind us. The $306B two-week drain has not reversed, but TGA is almost certainly at or near its seasonal peak — the probability of a mid-May unwind is rising. Critically, yields stopped deteriorating: 10Y held at 4.294% and the Trump-Powell ceasefire extension removed the tail risk that was driving the most aggressive risk-off. The next 48 hours are decisive: the new H.4.1 data will either confirm TGA has peaked (bullish) or show further accumulation (bearish).
summary.zh: 美元流动性仍处于紧缩模式，但最坏时刻大概率已过。3060 亿美元的两周抽水尚未逆转，但 TGA 几乎肯定处于或接近季节性顶部——5 月中旬回落的概率正在上升。关键是，收益率停止恶化：10Y 维持在 4.294%，Trump 停火延长消除了驱动最激进风险规避的尾部风险。未来 48 小时是决定性的：新的 H.4.1 数据将确认 TGA 已见顶（看涨）或显示进一步累积（看跌）。

rrp_note.en: Effectively zero — no meaningful liquidity buffer
rrp_note.zh: 实际归零——无实质性流动性缓冲

tga_note.en: +$227.4B WoW — likely at seasonal peak, unwind probability rising
tga_note.zh: 周环比 +2274 亿美元——大概率处于季节性顶部，回落概率上升

net_liquidity_change.en: -$306B (2-week) — worst likely behind, awaiting H.4.1 confirmation
net_liquidity_change.zh: -3060 亿美元（两周）——最坏时刻大概率已过，等待 H.4.1 确认

details.en: The liquidity picture is at an inflection point. The mechanical drain ($306B over two weeks) has not reversed, but the catalysts for further deterioration are diminishing: TGA is near peak, Trump-Powell ceasefire extension removes the policy tail risk, and yields have stabilized. The key question is whether the H.4.1 data confirms TGA has peaked. If yes, net liquidity will begin recovering toward $6.0T+ over the next 4-6 weeks, which historically supports equity markets. If TGA continues to rise, the tightening pressure intensifies and the score would drop back toward Low Conviction.
details.zh: 流动性状况处于拐点。机械性抽水（两周 3060 亿美元）尚未逆转，但进一步恶化的催化剂正在减少：TGA 接近顶部，Trump 停火延长消除政策尾部风险，收益率已稳定。关键问题是 H.4.1 数据是否确认 TGA 已见顶。如果是，净流动性将在未来 4-6 周开始向 6 万亿美元以上恢复，历史上这对股市有支撑。如果 TGA 继续上升，紧缩压力将加剧，分数将回落至低确信度区间。

reason.en: The $306B two-week drain remains in place, bank reserves at $2.98T. However, TGA is almost certainly at or near its seasonal peak — the probability of a mid-May unwind is high. Yields stopped deteriorating (10Y 4.294% stable). Trump-Powell ceasefire extension removed the policy tail risk. Score raised from 38 to 42 as the worst is likely behind, but confirmation requires H.4.1 data showing TGA decline. Credit spreads at 2021 lows are a positive signal that systemic stress is not building.
reason.zh: 3060 亿美元的两周抽水仍然存在，银行准备金 2.98 万亿美元。但 TGA 几乎肯定处于或接近季节性顶部——5 月中旬回落的概率很高。收益率停止恶化（10Y 4.294% 稳定）。Trump 停火延长消除了政策尾部风险。由于最坏时刻大概率已过，分数从 38 升至 42，但确认需要 H.4.1 数据显示 TGA 下降。信用利差处于 2021 年以来最低水平，是系统性压力未在积累的正面信号。

reason.en: 88% beat rate, Q1 earnings growth expectations revised up to 20% (from 13.2% — a significant acceleration). Credit spreads at 2021 lows confirm no systemic stress. Tesla reported EPS beat but delivery volume -8% YoY — a mixed signal. The beat-and-drop risk remains but has not escalated to mega-cap tech broadly. This week: Alphabet, IBM, Boeing are the key reporters. Score raised from 65 to 68 as earnings growth acceleration to 20% is a genuine positive.
reason.zh: 超预期率 88%，Q1 盈利增长预期上调至 20%（从 13.2%——显著加速）。信用利差处于 2021 年以来最低水平，确认无系统性压力。Tesla 报告 EPS 超预期但交付量同比 -8%——混合信号。「超预期后下跌」风险仍然存在，但尚未广泛扩散至大型科技股。本周：Alphabet、IBM、Boeing 是关键报告者。由于盈利增长加速至 20% 是真实的正面信号，分数从 65 升至 68。

reason.en: This is the most concerning signal: Nasdaq made a new all-time high while breadth declined to 56.26% (36th percentile historically) and is still falling. This is a textbook breadth divergence — a classic warning sign of a narrow, concentrated rally that historically precedes corrections. Technology sector +2.25% is leading while financials, industrials, and real estate are declining. The concentration risk is extreme. Score reduced from 48 to 40 — this divergence alone warrants caution.
reason.zh: 这是最令人担忧的信号：Nasdaq 创历史新高，而广度下降至 56.26%（历史上第 36 百分位）且仍在下滑。这是教科书级的广度背离——集中、狭窄反弹的经典警告信号，历史上往往先于回调。科技板块 +2.25% 领涨，而金融、工业和地产下跌。集中度风险极端。分数从 48 降至 40——仅此背离就足以保持谨慎。

reason.en: S&P +1.05%, Nasdaq new all-time high, VIX declined to 18.92 (-2.97%), Trump ceasefire extension removed the immediate tail risk. These are genuine positive price signals. However, pre-market futures are flat despite the strong close, and the breadth divergence means the new highs are not broadly confirmed. Oil at $92.50 remains elevated. Score raised from 35 to 55 as the acute risk-off has reversed, but the contradictions (new highs + deteriorating breadth) prevent a higher score.
reason.zh: 标普 +1.05%，Nasdaq 创历史新高，VIX 下降至 18.92（-2.97%），Trump 停火延长消除了即时尾部风险。这些是真实的正面价格信号。但盘前期货在强劲收盘后持平，广度背离意味着新高没有得到广泛确认。油价 $92.50 仍处高位。由于急性风险规避已逆转，分数从 35 升至 55，但矛盾（新高 + 广度恶化）阻止了更高分数。

trading_summary.en:
50.2 — Moderate floor. Market is splitting. Indices at new highs but foundation cracking. Nasdaq new high, earnings accelerating to 20%, credit at 2021 lows, ceasefire extended, VIX declining — all real positives. But breadth at 56% (36th percentile) and declining while indices make new highs = textbook divergence warning.

Standard position 50%, wait for breadth confirmation and liquidity inflection. Add conditions: H.4.1 confirms TGA decline + breadth back above 60% + VIX stable below 17. Meet two to add.
trading_summary.zh:
50.2分，Moderate 最低端。市场在分裂——指数创新高但地基在松动。Nasdaq 新高、盈利加速至 20%、信用极强、停火延长、VIX 下降，都是真金白银的正面信号。但 56% 广度处于 36th percentile 且在下滑，教科书级顶部预警。

标准仓位 50%，等广度确认和流动性拐点。加码条件：H.4.1 确认 TGA 回落 + 广度回升 60%+ + VIX 稳定 17 以下，满足两个加码。

trading_quote: The market can remain irrational longer than you can remain solvent.

note.en: Strong recovery — but breadth divergence means the rally is narrow
note.zh: 强劲反弹——但广度背离意味着反弹是狭窄的

note.en: All-time high — driven by mega-cap tech, not broad participation
note.zh: 历史新高——由大型科技股驱动，非广泛参与

note.en: Lagging Nasdaq — breadth divergence visible across indices
note.zh: 落后 Nasdaq——指数间广度背离可见

note.en: Small caps recovered but still lagging mega-cap tech
note.zh: 小盘股反弹但仍落后大型科技股

note.en: Yields stabilized — tightening transmission paused for now
note.zh: 收益率稳定——紧缩传导暂停

note.en: Mid-curve stable — rate cut expectations intact
note.zh: 中段曲线稳定——降息预期完整

note.en: Dollar firm — risk-on not fully confirmed by currency markets
note.zh: 美元坚挺——货币市场未完全确认风险偏好

note.en: Slight pullback as Trump tail risk reduced — still near all-time highs
note.zh: Trump 尾部风险降低后小幅回调——仍接近历史高位

note.en: Slight pullback but still elevated — inflation risk persists
note.zh: 小幅回调但仍处高位——通胀风险持续
强劲反弹——接近 $80K 阻力位

note.en: Declining — acute risk-off reversed, but still above 18 is elevated
note.zh: 下降——急性风险规避逆转，但仍在 18 以上偏高

analysis.en: BTC +2.67% to $78,417, approaching the key $80,000 resistance level. This is the strongest single-day move in the recent period and confirms BTC is acting as a risk-on asset alongside equities today. Fear & Greed at 58 (Greed territory) shows improving sentiment. Exchange net outflows continue. The key test: can BTC break and hold above $80,000? A sustained close above $80K would be technically significant and could attract momentum buyers. The correlation with Nasdaq (both making new highs) is worth watching.
analysis.zh: BTC +2.67% 至 $78,417，接近关键的 $80,000 阻力位。这是近期最强的单日涨幅，确认 BTC 今天与股市一起作为风险资产表现。恐惧贪婪指数 58（贪婪区域）显示情绪改善。交易所净流出持续。关键测试：BTC 能否突破并守住 $80,000 以上？持续收盘于 $80K 以上将具有技术重要性，可能吸引动量买家。与 Nasdaq（两者都创新高）的相关性值得关注。

gold_silver_note.en: Slightly lower as Trump tail risk reduced — structural bull case intact
gold_silver_note.zh: 随 Trump 尾部风险降低略有下降——结构性看涨逻辑完整

key_driver.en: Safe Haven + Structural Bull + Oil Inflation
key_driver.zh: 避险需求 + 结构性看涨 + 油价通胀

key_driver_detail.en: Central bank buying + geopolitical risk + oil at $92.50 + long-term dollar credibility concerns
key_driver_detail.zh: 央行购金 + 地缘政治风险 + 油价 $92.50 + 长期美元信誉担忧

analysis.en: Gold -0.20% to $4,743.70 — a minor pullback as the Trump-Powell tail risk was reduced by the ceasefire extension. This is healthy price action: gold is consolidating near all-time highs rather than collapsing. The structural bull case remains intact: central bank buying, geopolitical risk, oil at $92.50 adding inflation pressure, and long-term dollar credibility concerns. The slight pullback in gold while equities rallied confirms that today's equity move was driven by risk-on sentiment, not just a flight from dollar assets.
analysis.zh: 黄金 -0.20% 至 $4,743.70——随着停火延长降低 Trump-Powell 尾部风险，出现小幅回调。这是健康的价格行为：黄金在接近历史高位处整理，而非崩跌。结构性看涨逻辑依然完整：央行购金、地缘政治风险、油价 $92.50 增加通胀压力、长期美元信誉担忧。黄金小幅回调而股市反弹，确认今天的股市上涨是由风险偏好情绪驱动的，而非单纯逃离美元资产。

title.zh: 广度背离——教科书级顶部预警

description.en: Nasdaq made a new all-time high while breadth declined to 56.26% (36th percentile historically) and is still falling. This is the most concerning signal in today's report. Technology sector +2.25% is leading while financials, industrials, and real estate are declining. When indices make new highs but breadth is deteriorating, it historically precedes corrections — the rally is being driven by fewer and fewer stocks. The concentration risk is extreme: if the mega-cap tech leaders stumble (Alphabet reports this week), the narrow rally could unwind quickly.
description.zh: Nasdaq 创历史新高，而广度下降至 56.26%（历史上第 36 百分位）且仍在下滑。这是今天报告中最令人担忧的信号。科技板块 +2.25% 领涨，而金融、工业和地产下跌。当指数创新高但广度在恶化时，历史上往往先于回调——反弹由越来越少的股票驱动。集中度风险极端：如果大型科技股领头羊出现问题（Alphabet 本周报告），狭窄的反弹可能迅速瓦解。

title.en: Liquidity Inflection Unconfirmed — H.4.1 Data Critical
title.zh: 流动性拐点未确认——H.4.1 数据至关重要

description.en: The $306B two-week liquidity drain has not reversed. The assumption that TGA has peaked is based on seasonal patterns, but it requires confirmation from the H.4.1 data (released weekly by the Fed). If the new H.4.1 data shows TGA continuing to rise, the liquidity tightening narrative intensifies and the score would drop back to Low Conviction. This is the single most important data point in the next 48 hours. Bank reserves at $2.98T remain below the $3T threshold that historically triggers Fed concern.
description.zh: 3060 亿美元的两周流动性抽水尚未逆转。TGA 已见顶的假设基于季节性规律，但需要 H.4.1 数据（美联储每周发布）的确认。如果新的 H.4.1 数据显示 TGA 继续上升，流动性紧缩叙事将加剧，分数将回落至低确信度区间。这是未来 48 小时最重要的单一数据点。银行准备金 2.98 万亿美元仍低于历史上触发美联储关注的 3 万亿美元门槛。

title.en: Oil at $92.50 + Alphabet Earnings — Dual Catalysts This Week
title.zh: 油价 $92.50 + Alphabet 财报——本周双重催化剂

description.en: Oil at $92.50 remains elevated, compressing profit margins and limiting the Fed's ability to cut rates. This week, Alphabet, IBM, and Boeing report earnings. Alphabet is the critical test: it is the largest ad-revenue company, and its results will signal whether the digital advertising market is holding up. If Alphabet shows beat-and-drop, the pattern spreads to the largest market-cap stocks and the earnings support narrative breaks. Tesla's mixed signal (EPS beat but delivery -8%) is a preview of what could happen with other mega-caps.
description.zh: 油价 $92.50 仍处高位，压缩利润率并限制美联储降息能力。本周 Alphabet、IBM 和 Boeing 报告财报。Alphabet 是关键测试：它是最大的广告收入公司，其业绩将发出数字广告市场是否支撑的信号。如果 Alphabet 出现「超预期后下跌」，该模式将扩散至市值最大的股票，盈利支撑叙事将破裂。Tesla 的混合信号（EPS 超预期但交付量 -8%）是其他大型科技股可能发生情况的预演。

description.en: The breadth divergence has been upgraded to a major warning: Nasdaq at all-time highs while breadth is at the 36th percentile historically and declining. This is a textbook top formation signal. Additionally: (1) Technology +2.25% leading while financials/industrials/real estate declining — sector rotation is not confirming the rally. (2) BTC and Nasdaq both at new highs but gold only -0.20% — if this were a genuine risk-on environment, gold would be falling more. (3) Pre-market futures flat despite strong close — overnight conviction is low.
description.zh: 广度背离已升级为重大预警：Nasdaq 处于历史高位，而广度处于历史第 36 百分位且下滑。这是教科书级的顶部形态信号。此外：（1）科技 +2.25% 领涨，而金融/工业/地产下跌——板块轮动未确认反弹。（2）BTC 和 Nasdaq 都创新高，但黄金仅 -0.20%——如果这是真正的风险偏好环境，黄金应该跌得更多。（3）盘前期货在强劲收盘后持平——隔夜信念低。

references.title: Market Data — SPX, NDX, DJI, BTC, Gold, VIX

disclaimer.en: Data sources: Yahoo Finance / FRED / U.S. Treasury / MacroMicro. For research purposes only, not investment advice.
disclaimer.zh: 数据来源：Yahoo Finance / FRED / 美国财政部 / MacroMicro。仅供研究，非投资建议。
